resources.title: Foundation Kit
resources.tagline: The complete starting point for your career journey
resources.description: Everything you need to understand where you are, where you want to go, and how to get there. The perfect first step.
resources.whoIsItFor: Students in Year 10 through to recent graduates who want to get serious about their career direction.

resources.title: CV Booster Guide
resources.tagline: Write a CV that actually gets read
resources.description: A practical, no-fluff guide to writing a CV that stands out — with real before-and-after examples.
resources.whoIsItFor: Anyone writing their first CV or wanting to improve an existing one — school leavers, apprenticeship applicants, and graduates.

resources.title: CV Template Pack
resources.tagline: Professional CV templates ready to fill in
resources.description: Three ATS-friendly CV templates in different styles — modern, classic, and minimal. Editable in Word and Google Docs.
whatsInside: Editable in Word and Google Docs
resources.whoIsItFor: Students and graduates applying for jobs, apprenticeships, or work experience who want a professional starting point.

resources.title: Cover Letter Pack
resources.tagline: Five cover letter templates that get noticed
resources.description: Stop staring at a blank page. Five done-for-you cover letter templates with a guide to making each one your own.
resources.whoIsItFor: Anyone writing a cover letter for a job, apprenticeship, or university application — especially those applying for the first time.

resources.title: Interview Cheat Sheet
resources.tagline: Walk into any interview feeling prepared
resources.description: The only interview prep you need. Top questions, the STAR method explained, and a day-of checklist — all on one sheet.
resources.whoIsItFor: Anyone preparing for a job interview, assessment centre, or apprenticeship interview — from first-timers to those returning after a break.

resources.title: Understanding Pay Guide
resources.tagline: Decode your payslip and know your rights
resources.description: Tax, National Insurance, payslips, and salary negotiation — explained in plain English for young people starting work.
resources.whoIsItFor: Students and young people starting their first job or apprenticeship who want to understand their pay and rights.

resources.title: AI For Students Playbook
resources.tagline: Use AI tools to get ahead — ethically and effectively
resources.description: AI isn't going away. This playbook shows you what tools actually help, how to use them properly, and how to make AI a career advantage — not a shortcut.
whatsInside: What AI tools actually do (in plain English)
The best free AI tools for students
How to use AI ethically and effectively
resources.whoIsItFor: Students of all ages who want to understand and use AI tools in their studies and job applications — no tech background needed.
